reasoning_summary: Pinterest SWE I (entry-level by title). Backend role building Pinner-facing features on one of the largest public cloud workloads. Strong brand, US location. Aligns with Python/backend profile. Minimum requirements explicitly state entry-level.
title: Software Engineer I, Backend

reasoning_summary: Stripe SWE L2 — entry-level Stripe band (18 months min). Strong fintech brand. Seattle location. Backend-heavy, Python/Ruby stack. Stripe L2 is the first full-time engineering level above new grad.
title: Software Engineer L2

reasoning_summary: Ramp explicit New Grad SWE Frontend. Graduating May 2026 target, deferred start Summer/Fall 2026. Remote role. Ramp is a high-growth fintech unicorn. TypeScript/React stack. Strong new grad signal — exactly the profile this system targets.
title: University Grad | Software Engineer | Frontend

reasoning_summary: Zscaler SDE on SecOps Detection Engine team. Only requires 1+ year Golang + 1+ year AWS. Security-focused company (cloud security leader). Detection engine work aligns with security engineering profile. Remote US. Good entry point into security-focused SWE at a top vendor.
title: Software Development Engineer (Golang)
